name: ON SEMICONDUCTOR CORP
summary: ON Semiconductor Corporation (onsemi) designs and sells intelligent power and intelligent sensing semiconductor solutions for automotive, industrial, and other markets including AI data centers. Products include SiC power devices, MOSFET modules, CMOS image sensors, gate drivers, and analog/mixed-signal ICs. The company operates three segments—PSG, AMG, and ISG—and sells through distributors and direct customers globally.

products.name: SiC Power Devices (EliteSiC)
products.description: Silicon carbide power switching devices for EV drivetrains, fast-charging, and AI data centers.

products.name: SiC JFET Products
products.description: Silicon Carbide Junction Field-Effect Transistor technology acquired from Qorvo for AC-DC power supply units.

products.name: MOSFET Products
products.description: Metal oxide semiconductor field-effect transistors for high-efficiency power conversion applications.

products.name: CMOS Image Sensors
products.description: Complementary metal oxide semiconductor image sensors for automotive safety and industrial automation.

products.name: Image Signal Processors (ISP)
products.description: Processors for advanced driver assistance systems and autonomous driving applications.

products.name: Single Photon Detectors (SPAD/SiPM)
products.description: Single photon avalanche diode arrays and silicon photomultipliers for sensing applications.

products.name: Gate Driver Products
products.description: Gate drivers supporting high-power conversion in automotive and industrial systems.

products.name: Vertical GaN Products
products.description: Gallium Nitride power devices for high-efficiency power applications.

products.name: Power Module Products
products.description: Integrated power modules for automotive, industrial, and energy infrastructure markets.

products.name: Analog and Mixed-Signal Products
products.description: Analog ICs, ASICs, logic, isolation, and non-volatile memory products for various end markets.

products.name: Indirect Time of Flight Sensors
products.description: Sensing devices for automation, robotics, and industrial applications.

products.name: Short-Wave Infrared (SWIR) Sensors
products.description: Infrared imaging sensors for industrial and sensing applications.

products.name: Vcore Power Technologies
products.description: Power management IP acquired from Aura Semiconductor to enhance power management portfolio.

partnerships.description: Administrative agent for the $1.5 billion Revolving Credit Facility under the Credit Agreement dated June 22, 2023.
